Name: Research Paper : Semantic Gravity
Text: A mechanistic study revealing why LLMs systematically violate negative constraints (e.g. 'don't use word X'), introducing semantic pressure as a quantitative predictor of instruction failure.

Name: How a 7-Billion-Parameter AI Cannot Add
Text: An interpretability study revealing that LLMs systematically hallucinate a 'length bias' in large-number addition — believing the answer is always one digit longer — causing them to paradoxically outperform on harder overflow problems where this false prior accidentally aligns with the correct answer.

Name: Continuous Learning LLM
Text: A system which lets an LLM learn new details as it interacts with users.

Name: AI Agent Communication Protocol
Text: An AI written summary of my work-in-progress AI Agent Communication Protocol.

Name: Smart Medical Search
Text: Write a brief description of your symptoms and know what kind of doctor you should visit.

Name: Garden Watering System
Text: Automating the watering of my home garden because I’m forgetful.

Name: AI Shoe Design
Text: With reference of clothing or accessory items, the app generates a shoe design similar to the aesthetics in the reference images.

Name: The Medium AI Articles
Text: Series of Medium Posts to explain how current AI works in layman terms.

Name: Q-Commerce Demo: Grocery Crate Analysis wrt Customer Profile
Text: Built a short demo to classify grocery crates on basis of quality of vegetables wrt the Customer they were meant for.

Name: Q-Commerce Demo: List to Cart
Text: Created a demo for generating a full cart from a list of items.

Name: Claude 3.5 Sonnet Twitter Account
Text: Gave Claude 3.5 Sonnet access to its own Twitter Account

Name: Parker Square Search
Text: Trying to solve an unsolved maths problem of a 3x3 grid of perfect squares, where each row, column and diagonal add up to the same number.
